'''Nui Gneppe''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Filordus]] archivist who worked for the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] for over a [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]] until he grew bored with them and went to work for [[Naescorcom/Legends|Naescorcom]] on [[Ipsus]]. Within Line Two, Naescorcom's underground [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] production line, Gneppe documented all activities, especially those that involved an explosion.<ref name="LFCG" />

Gneppe was thin-faced and walked with one shoulder several [[Centimeter/Legends|centimeters]] lower than the other. He enjoyed telling stories of the feud between the Trade Federation and the [[Metatheran Cartel]], doing a humorous impersonation of a scared [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] asking for [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]]. He was also a [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] history buff.<ref name="LFCG" />
